titlestmt.titleproper: Maurice C. Burritt Director of Extension papers21-24-101
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M.E. Warren

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Maurice C. Burritt Director of Extension papers
did.abstract: Correspondence and other records of the Director of Extension at the New York State College of Agriculture.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and other records of the Director of Extension at the New York State College of Agriculture. Topics include services for farmers, fruit and vegetable growers, and homemakers; other New York State agricultural organizations; New York State counties; and reports on the current state of the New York State College of Agriculture and its extension program. Included is a photograph album illustrating the overcrowded conditions in the New York State College of Agriculture as of 1920.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Maurice C. Burritt Director of Extension papers, #21-24-101. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
